item.text:
Updated the lead summary flow to use `LeadDigest` end-to-end.

In [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-oracle-compiler-owned-air-GE3q4O/Shared/Lead.clasp), `LeadSummary` was replaced with `LeadDigest`, `LeadPlaybookLookup` now carries `owner` and `needsFollowUp`, and `LeadFollowUpState` now stores `digest : LeadDigest`.

In [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-oracle-compiler-owned-air-GE3q4O/Main.clasp), the summarizer, API route, and playbook request mapper were updated to the new contract. `main` now evaluates through the new owner field and returns `"senior-ae"`.

Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`.
